category_sources: source_facts.description says Chainsaw searches and hunts through Windows forensic artefacts; official GitHub README and wiki describe threat hunting, event logs, MFT, Sigma rules, and DFIR use.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is chainsaw; official GitHub repository is WithSecureLabs/chainsaw and README title/description use Chainsaw.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README says extended information is in the project wiki; the wiki has usage and feature pages for Chainsaw.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/WithSecureLabs/chainsaw; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README and wiki list Windows forensic artefacts, Event Logs, MFT, Sigma detection rules, threat hunting, DFIR-style output formats, and Rust implementation.
